title: Xerific Brazilian Uni Paella
description: A rich, snappy, festive Brazilian dish featuring uni, whisk and a flexitarian-friendly twist.
instructions: Heat the saffron-infused oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and crispy, about 4 minutes.
Add the red onion and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the white rice and stir to coat the rice in oil and mix with the chorizo and onion mixture.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Add the uni and stir to distribute evenly.
Cook, uncovered, until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender and crispy, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in the fresh cilantro, whisk, salt, and black pepper.
Drizzle with lime juice and cilantro oil.
